ā–ø **detectPackageManager**(`dir?`): [`PackageManager`](/docs/reference/devkit/PackageManager)

Detects which package manager is used in the workspace based on the lock file.

#### Parameters

| Name | Type |
| :------ | :------ |
| `dir?` | `string` |
